title: calamintha arvensis
intro: Calamintha arvensis, also known as lesser calamint, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to relieve digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have several health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, and improving cognitive function. Calamintha arvensis can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
